name: Happy Number
description: Write an algorithm to determine if a number n is happy. A happy number is defined by the following process: Starting with any positive integer, replace the number by the sum of the squares of its digits, and repeat until the number equals 1 (happy) or loops endlessly in a cycle (not happy). Use Floyd's cycle detection or a hash set.

performance.stress_intent: exercise large values near 2^31 that punish unbounded cycle detection without Floyd's or hash set
